question: How many days had passed between the Hindu festival of Holi and the Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church?
ground_truth_answer: 21 days. 22 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
User attended Sunday mass at St. Mary's Church on March 19th.
User attended Holi celebration at local temple on February 26th.
User is interested in the origins of Holi.
User met cousin Emma at St. Mary's Church last Sunday.
User met cousin Emma at St. Mary's Church last Sunday.
User's cousin Emma visited and sat next to them at St. Mary's Church.
Holi marks the arrival of spring.
User is learning about the significance of Holi.
User is interested in the cultural importance of Holi in India.
Holi is a time to repair and strengthen relationships.
